{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Architect",
  "description": "Multixept Associates Limited an established architectural firm with over 25 years of experience. Founded in Lagos and now headquartered in Abuja, the firm provides architectural, project management, and construction-related services across Nigeria through its group of companies.?&nbsp;Multixept Associates is an architectural and design practice focused on delivering thoughtful, buildable and high-quality design solutions across residential, commercial and mixed-use developments. It operates within an integrated platform spanning architecture, construction and real estate development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Architect

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Architect is responsible for developing and coordinating architectural designs from concept through construction, ensuring that design intent is clear, buildable and aligned with project objectives.
	The role requires strong technical ability, attention to detail and close coordination with construction teams to ensure effective execution.


Key Responsibilities
Design Development:


	Develop architectural concepts and detailed design drawings blueprints, and 3D models.
	Translate project briefs into functional and buildable designs
	Prepare and review construction documentation


Technical Coordination:


	Coordinate with structural, MEP and other consultants.
	Ensure all drawings are complete, accurate and aligned.
	Resolve design issues during construction.


Construction Support:


	Work closely with Project Managers and Site Engineers.
	Respond to RFIs and site queries.
	Ensure design intent is maintained during execution.


Documentation &amp; Standards:


	Maintain drawing standards and documentation discipline.
	Ensure version control and drawing accuracy.
	Prepare schedules and specifications.


Success Metrics


	Accuracy and completeness of drawings.
	Minimal design-related site issues.
	Speed of response to site queries.
	Alignment between design and execution.


Requirements


	5&ndash;8 years of experience in architectural practice.
	Excellent use of Revit.
	Ability to produce detailed working drawings.
	Strong understanding of construction processes.
	Ability to read and coordinate engineering drawings.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter (PDF format) to:&nbsp;admin@multixeptassociates.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Architect&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-20",

Architect Job at Multixept Associates Limited




        
    

        
        Multixept Associates Limited an established architectural firm with over 25 years of experience. Founded in Lagos and now headquartered in Abuja, the firm provides architectural, project management, and construction-related services across Nigeria through its group of companies.? Multixept Associates is an architectural and design practice focused on delivering thoughtful, buildable and high-quality design solutions across residential, commercial and mixed-use developments. It operates within an integrated platform spanning architecture, construction and real estate development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Architect
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Architect is responsible for developing and coordinating architectural designs from concept through construction, ensuring that design intent is clear, buildable and aligned with project objectives.
	The role requires strong technical ability, attention to detail and close coordination with construction teams to ensure effective execution.


Key Responsibilities
Design Development:


	Develop architectural concepts and detailed design drawings blueprints, and 3D models.
	Translate project briefs into functional and buildable designs
	Prepare and review construction documentation


Technical Coordination:


	Coordinate with structural, MEP and other consultants.
	Ensure all drawings are complete, accurate and aligned.
	Resolve design issues during construction.


Construction Support:


	Work closely with Project Managers and Site Engineers.
	Respond to RFIs and site queries.
	Ensure design intent is maintained during execution.


Documentation & Standards:


	Maintain drawing standards and documentation discipline.
	Ensure version control and drawing accuracy.
	Prepare schedules and specifications.


Success Metrics


	Accuracy and completeness of drawings.
	Minimal design-related site issues.
	Speed of response to site queries.
	Alignment between design and execution.


Requirements


	5–8 years of experience in architectural practice.
	Excellent use of Revit.
	Ability to produce detailed working drawings.
	Strong understanding of construction processes.
	Ability to read and coordinate engineering drawings.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter (PDF format) to: [email protected] using “Architect” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Executive (Tech & Telecoms)",
  "description": "Ruach Networks is a forward-thinking telecom and infrastructure company delivering reliable connectivity, cloud services, and sustainable digital solutions across Nigeria and globally. We enable businesses and communities with cutting-edge voice, sms and data network technologies, and eco-conscious innovation that drives growth in the digital age.


The company boasts several notable products, including Ruach Hosting, Ruach Voice, the VoIP Billing System, Ruach SMS/WhatsApp API, and Sportly.africa, along with other projects.



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive (Tech &amp; Telecoms)

Job Location:&nbsp;Kubwa,&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time



Role Overview


	We are seeking a results-driven and proactive Sales Executive to expand our customer base, drive revenue growth, and strengthen client relationships across our service offerings.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities across target markets
	Promote and sell Ruach Networks&rsquo; products and services (connectivity, cloud, VoIP, and related solutions)
	Build and maintain strong, long-term client relationships
	Conduct sales presentations, proposals, and negotiations
	Meet and exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets
	Stay informed on industry trends and competitor offerings


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in a relevant field
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in sales (preferably in telecoms, ISP, hosting, or IT services)
	Strong communication, presentation, and negotiation skills
	Proven ability to generate leads and close deals
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and able to work independently
	Familiarity with digital products, cloud services, or telecom infrastructure is an added advantage.




What We Offer


	Salary with performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to grow within a dynamic and innovative tech environment
	Exposure to cutting-edge telecom and cloud solutions
	Flexible hybrid work structure




Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@ruach.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.



The company boasts several notable products, including Ruach Hosting, Ruach Voice, the VoIP Billing System, Ruach SMS/WhatsApp API, and Sportly.africa, along with other projects.

22nd April, 2026.

Sales Executive (Tech & Telecoms) Job at Ruach Networks




        
    

        
        Ruach Networks is a forward-thinking telecom and infrastructure company delivering reliable connectivity, cloud services, and sustainable digital solutions across Nigeria and globally. We enable businesses and communities with cutting-edge voice, sms and data network technologies, and eco-conscious innovation that drives growth in the digital age.


The company boasts several notable products, including Ruach Hosting, Ruach Voice, the VoIP Billing System, Ruach SMS/WhatsApp API, and Sportly.africa, along with other projects.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    





We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive (Tech & Telecoms)

Job Location: Kubwa, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time



Role Overview


	We are seeking a results-driven and proactive Sales Executive to expand our customer base, drive revenue growth, and strengthen client relationships across our service offerings.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities across target markets
	Promote and sell Ruach Networks’ products and services (connectivity, cloud, VoIP, and related solutions)
	Build and maintain strong, long-term client relationships
	Conduct sales presentations, proposals, and negotiations
	Meet and exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets
	Stay informed on industry trends and competitor offerings


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in a relevant field
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in sales (preferably in telecoms, ISP, hosting, or IT services)
	Strong communication, presentation, and negotiation skills
	Proven ability to generate leads and close deals
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and able to work independently
	Familiarity with digital products, cloud services, or telecom infrastructure is an added advantage.




What We Offer


	Salary with performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to grow within a dynamic and innovative tech environment
	Exposure to cutting-edge telecom and cloud solutions
	Flexible hybrid work structure




Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Manager",
  "description": "Sales Force Consulting -&nbsp;Our client is a group of companies with Interest in communications, vegetable oil production, palmkernel crushing, hospitality and real estate all located within the South East and South-South.

Due to expansion and diversification of their business model, they are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time
Interview Location: Onitsha
Interview Mode: Physical

Responsibilities


	Meet and surpass all set organizational goals and targets
	Drive efficiency in overall administration and operations
	Oversee all company operationsensuring quality execution as planned by the board
	Evaluate performance management processes of the company to ensure compliance and efficiency
	Monitor repairs, rehabilitation of all equipment ensuring constant functionality
	Work with vendors to ensure timely and quality completion of projects
	Enforce health and safety precautions
	Representingmanagement and board in any external program and event


Qualifications


	Preferably an Accounting or Business Management background graduate but with robust practical experience in business management
	Minimum of 15 years practical work experience 10 of which must be at a senior management level.


Other Qualities


	High level of organization and planning
	Excellent interpersonal, communication, and business skills.
	Strong ethical and moral values.
	Multitasking
	Good time management.
	Hardworking, target oriented, with high level of leadership skills


Skill Set:


	Ability to work independently with little supervision.
	Attention to details
	Leadership skills
	Managerial skills
	Initiative.


Salary
N300,000 - N500,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV (PDF or Word) to:&nbsp;salesforceconsultingng@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&ldquo;Senior Manager&#39;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquiries: 08120796570 (Text messages or Whatsapp chats only. No calls).&nbsp;",

Senior Manager Job at Sales Force Consulting




        
    

        
        Sales Force Consulting - Our client is a group of companies with Interest in communications, vegetable oil production, palmkernel crushing, hospitality and real estate all located within the South East and South-South.

Due to expansion and diversification of their business model, they are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Manager

Job Location: Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time
Interview Location: Onitsha
Interview Mode: Physical

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Meet and surpass all set organizational goals and targets
	Drive efficiency in overall administration and operations
	Oversee all company operationsensuring quality execution as planned by the board
	Evaluate performance management processes of the company to ensure compliance and efficiency
	Monitor repairs, rehabilitation of all equipment ensuring constant functionality
	Work with vendors to ensure timely and quality completion of projects
	Enforce health and safety precautions
	Representingmanagement and board in any external program and event


Qualifications


	Preferably an Accounting or Business Management background graduate but with robust practical experience in business management
	Minimum of 15 years practical work experience 10 of which must be at a senior management level.


Other Qualities


	High level of organization and planning
	Excellent interpersonal, communication, and business skills.
	Strong ethical and moral values.
	Multitasking
	Good time management.
	Hardworking, target oriented, with high level of leadership skills


Skill Set:


	Ability to work independently with little supervision.
	Attention to details
	Leadership skills
	Managerial skills
	Initiative.


Salary
N300,000 - N500,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV (PDF or Word) to: [email protected] using “Senior Manager' as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries: 08120796570 (Text messages or Whatsapp chats only. No calls).     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Officer (Retail Supermarket)",
  "description": "Stretch-it Concepts Limited -&nbsp;We are a human resource outsourcing solutions company, bureau of recruitment, performance management and training and development company situated in Lagos, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer (Retail Supermarket)

Job Location:&nbsp;Anthony, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Inventory Officer is responsible for managing and controlling stock within the supermarket, ensuring accurate inventory records, proper stock levels, minimal losses, and efficient coordination between store, sales, and accounts.


Key Responsibilities
Stock Management &amp; Control:


	Maintain accurate records of all stock received, issued, and transferred
	Ensure proper documentation of goods inward and outward (GRN, issue notes, etc.)
	Monitor stock levels and initiate re-order processes when necessary


Stock Reconciliation:


	Conduct regular physical stock counts (daily, weekly, and monthly)
	Reconcile physical stock with system records and investigate discrepancies
	Report stock variances, damages, or losses to management promptly


Inventory Monitoring:


	Track fast-moving, slow-moving, and obsolete items
	Monitor product expiry dates and ensure timely removal of expired goods
	Ensure proper stock rotation (FIFO &ndash; First In, First Out)


Storage &amp; Handling:


	Ensure goods are properly stored to prevent damage, theft, or spoilage
	Maintain organization and cleanliness of the store/stockroom
	Supervise proper handling of goods during loading and offloading


Reporting:


	Prepare regular inventory reports for management (stock levels, variances, usage trends)
	Provide data to support purchasing and sales decisions


Coordination:


	Work closely with Sales Representatives, Shop-Floor Supervisor, and Accountant
	Support stock-taking exercises and audits
	Liaise with suppliers during deliveries when required


Compliance &amp; Loss Prevention:


	Ensure adherence to internal control procedures
	Support loss prevention and shrinkage control initiatives
	Comply with company policies and lawful management directives


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / BSc in Accounting, Business Administration, or related field
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in inventory, storekeeping, or retail operations
	Basic knowledge of inventory systems and stock control processes
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel (inventory tracking)
	Strong numerical and analytical skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Key Competencies:


	Accuracy and organization
	Analytical thinking
	Attention to detail
	Accountability
	Communication and teamwork.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@stretchitconcepts.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&ldquo;Inventory Officer&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-08",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-11",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "STRETCH-IT CONCEPTS"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",

    "value": "197139"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Inventory Officer (Retail Supermarket) Job at Stretch-it Concepts Limited




        
    

        
        Stretch-it Concepts Limited - We are a human resource outsourcing solutions company, bureau of recruitment, performance management and training and development company situated in Lagos, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer (Retail Supermarket)

Job Location: Anthony, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Inventory Officer is responsible for managing and controlling stock within the supermarket, ensuring accurate inventory records, proper stock levels, minimal losses, and efficient coordination between store, sales, and accounts.


Key Responsibilities
Stock Management & Control:


	Maintain accurate records of all stock received, issued, and transferred
	Ensure proper documentation of goods inward and outward (GRN, issue notes, etc.)
	Monitor stock levels and initiate re-order processes when necessary


Stock Reconciliation:


	Conduct regular physical stock counts (daily, weekly, and monthly)
	Reconcile physical stock with system records and investigate discrepancies
	Report stock variances, damages, or losses to management promptly


Inventory Monitoring:


	Track fast-moving, slow-moving, and obsolete items
	Monitor product expiry dates and ensure timely removal of expired goods
	Ensure proper stock rotation (FIFO – First In, First Out)


Storage & Handling:


	Ensure goods are properly stored to prevent damage, theft, or spoilage
	Maintain organization and cleanliness of the store/stockroom
	Supervise proper handling of goods during loading and offloading


Reporting:


	Prepare regular inventory reports for management (stock levels, variances, usage trends)
	Provide data to support purchasing and sales decisions


Coordination:


	Work closely with Sales Representatives, Shop-Floor Supervisor, and Accountant
	Support stock-taking exercises and audits
	Liaise with suppliers during deliveries when required


Compliance & Loss Prevention:


	Ensure adherence to internal control procedures
	Support loss prevention and shrinkage control initiatives
	Comply with company policies and lawful management directives


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / BSc in Accounting, Business Administration, or related field
	1–3 years of experience in inventory, storekeeping, or retail operations
	Basic knowledge of inventory systems and stock control processes
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel (inventory tracking)
	Strong numerical and analytical skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Key Competencies:


	Accuracy and organization
	Analytical thinking
	Attention to detail
	Accountability
	Communication and teamwork.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using “Inventory Officer” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Teller Job at Premium Human Resources Solution Limited




        
    

        
        At Premium HR Solution - Our client, a reputable Commercial Bank, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Teller

Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Contract

Qualifications


	Candidates should possess an OND, NCE qualification with a minimum of 1 year of experience is required.
	Age: Not above 28 years.
	Must be living around Dawaki and Kubwa environs.
	Must have strong IT/data-entry skills, familiarity with Microsoft tools (Excel), and attention to detail.


Salary Expectation

	HMO, Pension, and other benefits.
